items.name: select_all_adp
items.doc: Selects all text in the named window's edit control.

items.name: copy_adp
items.doc: Copies the current selection in the named window.

items.name: cut_adp
items.doc: Cuts the current selection in the named window.

items.name: paste_adp
items.doc: Pastes clipboard content into the named window's edit control.
